nodes.name: Overcharged Capacitors
nodes.effect: All gauss weapons +8% damage. Gauss Flayer fire rate +5%.
nodes.notes: Baseline damage increase — the foundation of Legion firepower

nodes.name: Entropic Degradation
nodes.effect: Unlocks Entropic Charge equipment (armor degrades 5% per hit). All gauss weapons gain +2% passive armor degradation per hit.
nodes.notes: Every hit weakens the target for every subsequent hit

nodes.name: Tesla Capacitor Arrays
nodes.effect: Unlocks Tesla Capacitor (chains to 1 additional target at 50% damage). Doom-Scythe particle whip chain +1 target.
nodes.notes: Chain lightning begins — spread damage across formations

nodes.name: Molecular Disassembly Beams
nodes.effect: All gauss weapons +15% damage vs vehicles and buildings. Doomsday Cannon charge time 3s→2.5s.
nodes.notes: Anti-armor specialization — the patient siege doctrine rewarded

nodes.name: Tesla Cascade
nodes.effect: ALL gauss weapons chain-hit 1 additional target at 50% damage (stacks with Tesla Capacitor for 2 chains). Every shot hits primary AND arcs.
nodes.notes: CULMINATION — the entire Legion fires chain lightning simultaneously

nodes.name: Accelerated Self-Repair
nodes.effect: Passive regen 0.5%→0.8% HP/sec. Between-battle regen rate +5%.
nodes.notes: Faster healing at all times — compound advantage in sustained campaigns

nodes.name: Quantum Shielding Protocols
nodes.effect: Below 25% HP: 50% damage resistance for 4 seconds. All units 10% damage resistance below 40% HP.
nodes.notes: Emergency hardening — hard to finish off wounded Legion units

nodes.name: Improved Reanimation Protocols
nodes.effect: Reanimation base chance 15%→20%. Stand-up delay 5s→4s.
nodes.notes: DIRECT PRIMARY mechanic upgrade — 1 in 5 fallen units stands back up faster

nodes.name: Necrodermis Refinement
nodes.effect: Unlocks Necrodermis Shell equipment (+35% HP, 1.5%/sec regen, −20% speed). All passive regen 0.8%→1.0%/sec.
nodes.notes: Pinnacle of living-metal armor — the walking fortress configuration

nodes.name: Necrodermis Perfection
nodes.effect: Reanimation base 20%→25%. Passive regen 1.0%→1.5%/sec. Reanimated units return at 30% HP (up from 15%). Healing visually apparent in real-time.
nodes.notes: CULMINATION — functionally immortal against anything except sustained incendiary or acid

nodes.name: Hierarchical Optimization
nodes.effect: Commander aura radius +15%. All units within aura +3% accuracy.
nodes.notes: Better coordination — compound improvement across all ranged units

nodes.name: Targeting Engram Distribution
nodes.effect: Units within 30m share real-time targeting data. Firing at an already-engaged target: +8% accuracy bonus.
nodes.notes: Crude Tactical Link — the Legion's answer to the Accord's Marks

nodes.name: Dimensional Anchor Deployment
nodes.effect: Unlocks Dimensional Anchor support module. All units 50% reduced knockback and forced-displacement distance.
nodes.notes: Immovable objects — the Legion does not yield ground

nodes.name: Temporal Stasis Mastery
nodes.effect: Unlocks Temporal Stasis Field equipment (on death: freeze 10m radius, 3s). Chronometron slow duration +2s. All falling units apply 1s slow to nearby enemies.
nodes.notes: Even death serves the Legion — every casualty becomes a tactical event

nodes.name: Distributed Command Intelligence
nodes.effect: All Necro Generals share intel galaxy-wide instantly (zero delay). General auto-resolve +20%. Multi-sector simultaneous offensives enabled.
nodes.notes: CULMINATION — distributed machine intelligence across the entire command network

nodes.name: Tomb-World Excavation
nodes.effect: Ancient Ruins planets yield +50% lore fragments. Research conducted on Ruins planets 20% faster.
nodes.notes: Archaeological expertise — the Necro-Legion explores their own history

nodes.name: Doomsday-Monolith Activation
nodes.effect: Unlocks Doomsday-Monolith production. 7 cycles at Advanced War Factory. +10% Reanimation aura on deployment.
nodes.notes: 15m hovering obelisk of molecular disintegration

nodes.name: Cairn-Tombship Reactivation
nodes.effect: Unlocks Cairn-Tombship flagship. Requires Shipyard + dormant hull (found on Ancient Ruins planet) + 9 cycles.
nodes.notes: 2km of self-healing, 100,000-year-old living metal

nodes.name: Hybrid Gauss/Kinetic Synthesis
nodes.effect: Unlocks Hybrid Gauss/Kinetic Slug (Legendary: +15% vs BOTH Vorax AND Core Guardians). 1 set per 5 cycles per Forge.
nodes.notes: Gauss-enhanced kinetic impact — the dual-front endgame solution

nodes.name: Transdimensional Beaming
nodes.effect: All units: active teleport 20m (10s cooldown). Beamer weapon variant: displaces target 300m, applies 3s disorientation.
nodes.notes: CULMINATION — tactical teleportation bypassing terrain, cover, and fortifications entirely
